creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Patrick M. Hausen from comment #21)
Hi.

After we get the FreeBSD OUI working I have the following idea.

In https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-arm/2023-September/003066.html you posted that some bootargs are passed to the kernel. These bootargs contain "smsc95xx.macaddr=B8:27:EB:09:CB:7D".

It would be nice if we could get these args in the driver and use it to set a MAC address.
